Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies Stock 12‑Month Price Target Raised to $324.25, Implies 12% Upside
data.description:
• According to estimates from 12 analysts, Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies Corporation stock's average price target has risen from $318.25 to $321.33, with forecasts ranging from $280 to $355 per share
  • Based on the Jul. 22 closing price, the updated target implies approximately 11% potential upside
  • Consensus rating remains at “Buy” across 15 covering analysts, with 10 Buys, 5 Holds and 0 Sells

Explore more price target data and ratings for Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies Corporation on the , and track all previous and future analyst recommendations for Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies Corporation in the dedicated News Flow.

1.         KEY INFORMATION

(a) Full name of discloser:

Nomura International PLC

(b) Owner or controller of interests and short positions disclosed, if different from 1(a):

The naming of nominee or vehicle companies is insufficient.  For a trust, the trustee(s), settlor and beneficiaries must be named.

NA

(c) Name of offeror/offeree in relation to whose relevant securities this form relates:

Use a separate form for each offeror/offeree

EASYJET PLC

(d) If an exempt fund manager connected with an offeror/offeree, state this and specify identity of offeror/offeree:

NA

(e) Date position held/dealing undertaken:

22nd Jul 2026

If it is a cash offer or possible cash offer, state "N/A"

NA

(a)        Indemnity and other dealing arrangements

(b)        Agreements, arrangements or understandings relating to options or derivatives

DAE: Revenue and margins rose, led by Healthcare growth and Capsul'in integration, with positive outlook
data.description:
Net revenue grew 3.5% to CHF 582.7 million in H1 2026, with strong organic growth in Healthcare and successful integration of Capsul'in. Margins improved, and the company reaffirmed midterm targets, expecting further gains as transformation and portfolio initiatives progress.
